notes: GIF assets are converted to temporary MP4 with ffmpeg before upload.
This media judge is evidence-quality QA; it does not replace backend/browser production gates.

asset.title: App Manual Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The preview demonstrates a manual variance addition in a versioned spreadsheet, updating the room trace from v1 to v2.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows clicking '+ add' to calculate and display a variance percentage.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the state before the click, the action, and the resulting v2 state with updated trace.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode spreadsheet interface, though layout is basic.

consistency.evidence: Integrates spreadsheet cells, versioning, and room trace updates.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state transitions.

legibility.evidence: Text and numbers are readable, though some trace details are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates financial spreadsheet auditability, relevant to analysts.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately reflects UI behavior and trace log synchronization.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet interface with Q2 and Q3 columns
Clicking '+ add' on the Revenue row
Variance cell updating to +20.5%
Room trace updating to 6 events with Homen action
Version badge incrementing from v1 to v2
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Manually trigger variance calculations to instantly update the versioned spreadsheet and log the action in the room trace.

missingEvidence: Hover state or expanded view of the truncated research text

asset.title: App Variance Fill
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates automated variance calculations in a financial spreadsheet using collaborative agents, supported by a real-time trace log.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates agents locking cells, calculating variance percentages, and merging results.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire sequence from initiating collaboration to the final merged state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI with clear visual hierarchy between the spreadsheet and trace log.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's core concepts of spreadsheets, agents, and trace logs.

legibility.evidence: Spreadsheet values and status banners are highly readable, though trace text is slightly dense.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly applicable to financial analysts automating variance analysis.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the step-by-step execution and agent locking mechanisms.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet UI with Q2/Q3 financial data
Run collaboration button and active state
Agent locking indicators (+RA) in the Variance column
Real-time Room trace updates showing agent actions

defects.observed: The transition during agent execution is rapid, making it slightly hard to track individual lock releases.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the delay between agent steps in the demo recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom agents collaborate to lock, calculate, and merge variance analysis directly within a financial spreadsheet.

asset.title: Ask Spreadsheet Cas

defects.fix: Slow down the GIF frame rate or add pauses at key states to allow the viewer to read the chat and spreadsheet cells.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeAgent automatically reconcile Q3 variances, update the shared spreadsheet, and log its execution trace in real-time.

asset.title: Free Job Halo
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

asset.title: L1 Read

asset.title: L2 Edit

asset.title: L3 No Clobber
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step visualization of a concurrent write conflict (CAS) and agent recovery. The workflow is easy to follow and highly relevant for multi-agent systems.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, human intervention, conflict rejection, and final successful write.

observedEvidence: Step-by-step CAS conflict visualization
Agent execution log at the bottom

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom's CAS mechanism prevents agents from overwriting human edits mid-write, forcing a re-read and safe commit.

asset.title: L4 Draft
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly outlines the step-by-step logic of drafting when a range is locked. However, there is a logical repetition in the steps where the agent locks the range twice (at step 1/5 and 3/5), which should be corrected before publishing.

featureClarity.evidence: The goal and steps of drafting changes on a locked range are clearly stated in the bottom caption bar and top header.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows a step-by-step progression from goal to completion, though it functions more like a sequenced slideshow than a live UI capture.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode aesthetic with consistent typography and clear highlighting of the active row.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the versioning and locking concepts of NodeRoom, but lacks richer trace or spreadsheet context.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Feels somewhat simulated or simplified rather than showing a rich, interactive product environment.

legibility.evidence: High contrast text and clean layout make it very easy to read even at smaller sizes.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly presented as a step-by-step conceptual sequence without pretending to be a fully fluid live recording.

observedEvidence: Step-by-step sequence showing agent actions on a locked spreadsheet row
Status indicators showing 'LOCKED' and version changes

defects.observed: The sequence repeats the 'locks the affected range' action at step 3/5, which was already executed at step 1/5.
defects.fix: Revise the step sequence to ensure each step represents a unique, logical progression in the workflow.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Workflow preview demonstrating how NodeRoom agents safely draft edits on locked ranges to prevent overwrites.

defects.observed: Sudden zoom-in transition is disorienting and disrupts the visual flow.
defects.fix: Soften the transition with a smoother ease-in-out animation or maintain a consistent crop.

defects.observed: Spreadsheet cell values are too small to read in the default dual-client view.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size of the spreadsheet component or use a slightly tighter side-by-side layout.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's live sync in action: Client A triggers a server-led agent to reconcile Q3 revenue, instantly updating cells and locking states across both clients without page refreshes.

asset.title: Noderoom Live Collab V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: The video demonstrates multiplayer collaboration between humans and AI agents on a shared spreadsheet, highlighting conflict resolution and review workflows, though some technical slides pass too quickly.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI shows spreadsheet cells being edited by both a human and an agent, though the transition between modes is rapid.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the setup, conflict occurrence, code/architecture solution, and resolved state, but at a very fast pace.

visualDesign.evidence: Dark mode UI is clean and modern, but the text overlay and code slides have contrasting densities.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom concept of shared files, agents, and versioned cell edits.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows actual UI interactions and code, though some parts feel highly produced or simulated.

legibility.evidence: Most UI elements are readable, but the code snippet at 00:18 is quite small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers building multi-agent collaborative systems and transactional workspaces.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly states the transition from a simple demo to a complex collaboration substrate, showing the underlying code logic.

observedEvidence: Multiplayer spreadsheet UI with active cell edits
Code snippet showing conflict resolution logic
Diagram explaining lock/draft/review workflow
Review mode toggle and proposal approval flow
missingEvidence: Direct console or network logs showing the WebSocket sync events during conflict resolution.

defects.observed: The code snippet is displayed with small text and is difficult to read within the short duration.
defects.fix: Increase the font size of the code block or extend the slide duration.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Noderoom Live Collab demonstrates real-time multiplayer coordination between human users and AI agents editing a shared spreadsheet substrate with built-in conflict resolution.

asset.title: Private Investment Room V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: An excellent narrated explainer video demonstrating NodeRoom's collaborative spreadsheet, agent proposal workflow, and cell-level version history for an investment committee use case.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly demonstrates agent proposals, human approval, and cell versioning history.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the end-to-end flow from agent ingestion to proposal review and final cell commit.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark mode interface with smooth transitions and focused zoom-ins on key interactions.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the core NodeRoom concept of versioned spreadsheets and multi-agent collaboration.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows actual UI state changes, cell history logs, and interactive approval flows.

legibility.evidence: Text is generally readable, aided by timely zoom-ins on dense spreadsheet areas.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant to finance and investment professionals requiring data provenance and audit trails.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the agent's role as a drafting assistant rather than an autonomous decision-maker.

observedEvidence: Agent proposal workflow with 'Review mode ON'
Cell-level version history and attribution panel
Interactive spreadsheet with live collaboration features

defects.observed: Spreadsheet cell values and small labels are slightly hard to read before the zoom-in occurs.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the default font size or start with a tighter crop on the active workspace.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom enables high-trust investment workflows with versioned spreadsheets, agent proposals, and full audit trails.
